name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy plugins for Claude Code — feature flags, experiments, translations, in-app bug reports. Install `base` first, then any combination of feature plugins.

plugins.name: base
plugins.description: Required first. Installs the SDK, registers the MCP server, binds the repo to a Shipeasy project, and wires the SDK into the root layout. Every other shipeasy@* plugin assumes this is installed.

plugins.name: experiments-metrics
plugins.description: A/B experiments + custom event metrics. Enables the `experiments` module, registers the `shipeasy-experiments` skill, and adds the `/shipeasy-experiment` slash command.

plugins.name: configs-gates
plugins.description: Feature gates, dynamic configs, kill switches. Enables the `gates` + `configs` modules, registers the `shipeasy-flags` skill, and adds the `/shipeasy-flag` slash command.

plugins.name: polylang
plugins.description: Translations — i18n keys + CDN-served labels. Enables the `translations` module, registers the `shipeasy-i18n` skill, and adds `/shipeasy-i18n-extract` + `/shipeasy-i18n-migrate` slash commands.

plugins.name: bugs
plugins.description: In-app bug reports + feature requests via the devtools overlay. Enables the `feedback` module, registers the `shipeasy-bugs` skill, and adds the `/shipeasy-bug` slash command.
